{{CargoRelic
|name=Rejuvenation Scroll
|class_id=20218
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Rejuvenation spell is one of the most unfathomable dark magic. The caster needs to chant, establish a connection with the deceased's soul, and summon it into a well-kept corpse. The resurrected often suffer from loss of consciousness, self-judgment, and cognition, and will eventually be reduced to a walking corpse.
|fame=17
|art=13
|fth=28
|civ=15
|tech=17
|ss1=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail HP +10<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
|ss2=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail HP +20<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
|ss3=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail HP +30<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
|ss4=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail HP +30<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
|ss7=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail HP +30<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120<br> (Awakened)
}}
